ddls:
CREATE TABLE "circulars" (
  "circular_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circular */,
  "circular_no" TEXT /* Circular number */,
  "view_in_english" TEXT /* Link to view the circular in English */,
  "date_of_issue" TEXT /* Date the circular was issued */,
  "file_no" TEXT /* File number of the circular */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the circular */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the circular belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the circular (e.g., active, rescinded, superseded) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the circular becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the circular expires */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the official who created the circular */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the official who last modified the circular */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the circular was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circular_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circulars_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circulars_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circulars_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Full name of the official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., administrator, publisher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the official account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the official's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the official (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "circular_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circular being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the official who made the revision */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the official who approved the revision */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_circular_id FOREIGN KEY ("circular_id") REFERENCES circulars ("circular_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rescissions" (
  "rescission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rescission */,
  "circular_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circular being rescinded */,
  "rescission_date" TEXT /* Date the rescission was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rescission */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the official who rescinded the circular */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the official who approved the rescission */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the rescission was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rescission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rescissions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rescissions_circular_id FOREIGN KEY ("circular_id") REFERENCES circulars ("circular_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rescissions_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supersessions" (
  "supersession_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supersession */,
  "circular_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circular being superseded */,
  "supersession_date" TEXT /* Date the supersession was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the supersession */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the official who superseded the circular */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the official who approved the supersession */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the supersession was approved */,
  "new_circular_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new circular that supersedes the old one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supersession_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supersessions_new_circular_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_circular_id") REFERENCES circulars ("circular_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supersessions_circular_id FOREIGN KEY ("circular_id") REFERENCES circulars ("circular_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supersessions_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supersessions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "circular_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circular being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the circular */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the circular was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the circular */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the circular */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_circular_id FOREIGN KEY ("circular_id") REFERENCES circulars ("circular_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public, official) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "circular_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circular the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_circular_id FOREIGN KEY ("circular_id") REFERENCES circulars ("circular_id")
)
